title: Crispy Fermented Dumpling Crumble
description: A quick-fix dish featuring sour, crispy dumplings made with chilled butter and Mediterranean-friendly ingredients for a satisfying breakfast or snack.

ingredients.name: Fermented Dashi (optional)
ingredients.notes: For a sour flavor, use miso paste and rice vinegar for an authentic touch.

instructions: Mix yogurt with fermented dashi and salt.
Add chilled oil to the yogurt mixture until evenly combined.
Roll butter into small balls, dust with sesame seeds if desired.
Dip each ball of rolled butter into yogurt mixture until coated completely.
Place coated butters on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake at 350°F for about 12-15 minutes or until golden brown and crispy.
